events.title: Rethinking Mobility: Human-Centered AI for Safe, Confident and Fun Driving
events.description: Avinash Balachandran, VP of Human Interactive Driving at the Toyota Research Institute, will present at the ITS Transportation Seminar. Join for Cookie Hour at 2:30 p.m. in the ITS Library (412 McLaughlin Hall).

events.title: Plein AiR Patrol with Forest Stearns
events.description: Discover outdoor painting in the Garden with artist Forest Stearns of DRAWEVERYWHERE Studios at his monthly interactive Artist in Residency (AiR) project.

events.title: Composition Colloquium: Freida Abtan
events.location: Wu Performance Hall (Morrison Hall, Room 125), UC Berkeley
events.description: Freida Abtan presents on 'Sound and Image' in this Composition Colloquium, free and open to the public.

events.title: Chris Thile, mandolin and vocals
events.description: Mandolinist and vocalist Chris Thile performs an eclectic program, including selections from his new recording of Bach sonatas and partitas.

events.title: BAMPFA: Open: Art Lab
events.organizer: Berkeley Art Museum and Pacific Film Archive (BAMPFA)
events.description: The museum's popular Fisher Family Art Lab welcomes drop-in visitors of all ages to explore their creativity through hands-on artmaking.

events.description: The Cal Bears men's basketball team faces off against Pitt in an ACC conference game.

events.title: Yaa Samar! Dance Theatre: Gathering
events.description: Yaa Samar! Dance Theatre presents 'Gathering,' a contemporary dance performance exploring themes of community and connection.

events.title: Garden Shop Spring Clearance Sale
events.description: Find one-of-a-kind items, close-outs, and bargain prices on a variety of items at the Garden Shop's Spring Clearance Sale.

events.location: Evans Diamond at Stu Gordon Stadium, Berkeley, CA
